name: @spacesky-cell/agent-team-orchestrator
description: Agent Team Orchestrator - Multi-agent collaboration system powered by LangGraph

scripts.test: python -m pytest packages/core/tests -q --cov=ato_core --cov-fail-under=70 && pnpm exec vitest run --coverage --passWithNoTests
scripts.lint: python -m black --check packages/core/src packages/core/tests && python -m ruff check packages/core/src packages/core/tests && pnpm --filter @spacesky-cell/ato-shared lint && pnpm --filter @spacesky-cell/ato-cli lint && pnpm --filter @spacesky-cell/ato-mcp-server lint
scripts.typecheck: python -m mypy packages/core/src && pnpm --filter @spacesky-cell/ato-shared build && pnpm --filter @spacesky-cell/ato-shared exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter @spacesky-cell/ato-cli exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter @spacesky-cell/ato-mcp-server exec tsc --noEmit
scripts.verify: pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test && pnpm run build

author: spacesky-cell
